channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ben Roberts-Smith shares Anzac Day message at Currumbin dawn service
item.description: Ben Roberts-Smith, Australia’s most decorated living soldier and a recipient of the Victoria Cross, delivered a poignant Anzac Day message at the Currumbin dawn service. Despite being on bail while fa...

item.title: Nigeria Introduces National Single Window Platform and Tightens Import Restrictions
item.description: The Nigerian government has announced key reforms aimed at modernising the country's trade regulatory framework. On March 27, 2026, Nigeria will launch the National Single Window Platform, a digital s...

item.title: A Wild Ride Through the Chaos of University Life in 'Roommates'
item.description: Netflix’s latest hit, 'Roommates', brings the chaos of university life to the screen, following the story of Devon, a smart but socially awkward architecture student, played by Sadie Sandler. She ente...

item.title: Debate on faith versus policy as Akpabio comments on insecurity
item.description: This article look at the reaction trailing Senate President Godswill Akpabio’s recent statement say him dey pray make insurgency for Nigeria end by 2026. The comment don spark fresh debate about the r...

item.title: Debate on BEE must be grounded in evidence, not misinformation
item.description: The article reflects on South Africa’s 30 years of democracy, noting measurable progress in political freedoms, access to basic services, and modest shifts in economic inclusion since 1994. However, i...

item.title: Rain or Shine’s underdog rise in the 2026 PBA Commissioner’s Cup
item.description: Sa loob ng PBA, kung saan ang mga malalaking kumpanya tulad ng San Miguel Corporation at MVP Group ang naghahari sa mga kampeonato, ang Rain or Shine Elasto Painters ay nagsisilbing pinakamalakas na h...

item.title: Quebec Court of Appeal Allows Smoking in Theatrical Performances as Artistic Expression
item.description: Quebec’s Court of Appeal has ruled that actors may smoke on stage during theatrical performances, affirming that this can be protected as a form of artistic expression. The court upheld a previous rul...

item.title: Weekly Highlights from The Age Photography Team
item.description: The Age presents a curated collection of photographs capturing notable moments from the past week, as taken by its award-winning staff photographers and regular contributors. This gallery, dated April...

item.title: Met Police seeks wider use of facial recognition to monitor offenders amid sentencing changes
item.description: The Commissioner of the Metropolitan Police, Sir Mark Rowley, has urged a significant expansion in the use of live facial recognition technology, arguing it will be essential as justice reforms lead t...

item.title: Kogi PDP Chairman Praises Senator Natasha Akpoti-Uduaghan's Performance, Endorses Re-election Bid
item.description: The Kogi State chapter of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) has come out strong to endorse Senator Natasha Akpoti-Uduaghan for a second term in 2027. The State Chairman, Muhammed Sanni Gambo, declare...

item.title: Enforcement Directorate returns ₹63,000 crore to victims of financial fraud
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has restored assets worth over ₹63,000 crore to victims of financial crimes, which accounts for roughly 27% of the total ₹2.36 lakh crore attached under the Prevention...

item.title: Survey finds strong public support for Anzac Day despite declining participation
item.description: More than a century after the first Anzac Day was observed, new research suggests Australians still see it as a vital part of national life, even as participation in commemorative activities declines....

item.title: Researcher criticizes Saskatchewan's rollback of addiction support services
item.description: A sociology and public health researcher, Maryellen Gibson of the University of Saskatchewan, has raised concerns that the provincial government is reversing decades of progress in addiction policy fo...

item.title: Gauhati High Court rejects Pawan Khera’s anticipatory bail plea over allegations against Assam CM’s wife
item.description: The Gauhati High Court has rejected the anticipatory bail plea of Congress leader Pawan Khera in connection with his allegations against Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma’s wife, Riniki Bhuyan ...

item.title: NITR Rejects Claims of Redundancy, Says Staff Remain Active in Research
item.description: The Joint Unions of the Nigerian Institute for Trypanosomiasis Research (NITR) in Kaduna have firmly dismissed a report that claimed over 900 workers at the institute were idle. Dr Umar Musa, the Join...

item.title: Fire Erupts at Commonwealth Market, Leaving One Person Injured
item.description: A fire broke out at Commonwealth Market in Quezon City, leaving one person injured. The incident occurred on April 25, 2026, and prompted immediate response from local fire authorities. Firefighters q...

item.title: Iranian and US officials visit Islamabad for second round of peace talks
item.description: On April 24, 2026, an Iranian delegation headed by Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad, where they were welcomed by Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar, Ch...

item.title: Understanding SAFE and Convertible Notes for Startup Financing in Nigeria
item.description: This article explains two common funding instruments wey early-stage startups for Nigeria dey use: SAFEs (Simple Agreements for Future Equity) and Convertible Notes. As many new businesses dey try rai...

item.title: Christina Applegate Receives Support from Friends Amid Severe MS Flare-Up
item.description: Christina Applegate, the Emmy-winning actress, has been receiving heartfelt support from her friends and colleagues following a serious flare-up of her multiple sclerosis. The 54-year-old has been lar...

item.title: Marian Rivera highlights self-confidence and holistic skincare beyond whitening trends
item.description: Actress Marian Rivera is advocating for a more inclusive and empowering approach to beauty that goes beyond the traditional focus on skin whitening. In her recent feature, she emphasizes the importanc...
